title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: To exact revenge, Nishi disguises herself as Shreemoyee and spends the night with Rudro. On seeing Rudro with Nishi, Shreemoyee breaks down emotionally. Will Shreemoyee misunderstand Rudro? Will Nishi succeed in creating the misunderstanding?
